name: rpg-foundry-forge
description: Compiles a validated Obsidian RPG vault (built by rpg-vault-guardian / rpg-gamemaster) into a playable Foundry VTT session by orchestrating the foundry-vtt-mcp server — builds scenes and mood lighting, places creature actors as tokens with correct disposition (and optional AI token art), writes quest/lore/dashboard journals, assigns player ownership, and assembles encounters. Reads the vault as the contract (never imports other plugins) and writes to Foundry only via MCP. Idempotent and resumable through an on-disk build manifest. Compile units: encontro and sessao.
